title: WorldgenTweaks
description: A small collection of worldgen tweaks
body:
## A collection of small tweaks to Minecraft's worldgen
![Example Terrain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d0d5f96e7fbdfff7e689f158bc6667027fd3663_0.webp)
#### Features:
- Fixes bug MC-258859 allowing steep condition to be met in all cardinal directions
- Snow correctly generates under trees and on leaves
- Steep terrain is replaced with stone
